languages.text: Горе и безумие, переполнившие душу манипулуса Эоганна, окончательно пошатнули его разум. Осуществив противоестественный акт триасомии над телом ближайшего коллеги, генетор пал в бездну ереси, принявшись за череду отвратительных экспериментов, порожденных его воспаленным рассудком. Все сильнее и сильнее преступая грань дозволенного, Эоганн утратил человеческий облик, став одним из самых отъявленных еретехов, когда-либо известных Простору. Когда его тело окончательно трансформировалось в мерзкий конструкт из плоти, металла и зловещих технологий некронов, существо, некогда бывшее манипулусом Фебрусом, было похищено Тразином Неисчислимым, пополнив ряды экспонатов Бесконечного Музеона.

The grief and madness that engulfed the soul of Manipulus Eogunn Februs finally shattered his sanity. After performing the unnatural act of triasomia on the body of his dearest colleague, the Genetor descended into an abyss of heresy, embarking on a series of repulsive experiments conceived by his fevered mind. Straying further and further past all acceptable limits, Eogunn lost his human form and became one of the most malevolent hereteks the Expanse had ever known. His body now fully transformed into a foul construct of flesh, metal, and sinister Necron technology, the creature that had once been Manipulus Februs was captured by Trazyn the Infinite and added to the ranks of the exhibits in his Museion.

languages.text: マニピュラス・エオグン・フェブルスの魂を襲った悲しみと狂気は、ついに彼の心を壊してしまった。腐敗した死体を蘇らせるという彼の試みは、狂気の淵にまで彼を突き落とした。エオグンは、倫理観を無視した、最も不自然で汚い実験を次々と行い、エクスパンスの歴史上最も悪質なヘレテックの1人となった。異星人の神聖な技術も、ウォープ・スミスの歪んだ思想も、彼にとって禁断の領域ではなかった。
languages.original_text: The grief and madness that engulfed the soul of Manipulus Eogunn Februs finally shattered his mind. In his fruitless attempts to breathe life into the decaying dead man that had always been in his laboratory, the Genetor descended into an abyss of the most unnatural and foul experiments that his fevered mind could devise. Straying further and further into the unconscionable, Eogunn became one of the most malevolent hereteks the Expanse had ever known. Neither the ungodly technologies of the xenos nor the twisted ideas of warpsmithing were forbidden to him.

traits.locale_text: マニピュラス・エオグン・フェブルスの魂を襲った悲しみと狂気は、ついに彼の心を壊してしまった。腐敗した死体を蘇らせるという彼の試みは、狂気の淵にまで彼を突き落とした。エオグンは、倫理観を無視した、最も不自然で汚い実験を次々と行い、エクスパンスの歴史上最も悪質なヘレテックの1人となった。異星人の神聖な技術も、ウォープ・スミスの歪んだ思想も、彼にとって禁断の領域ではなかった。

languages.text: 悲痛与疯狂吞没了操纵者伊奥贡·费布鲁斯的灵魂，最终彻底摧毁了他的理智。在对他最亲爱的同僚的遗体施行那违逆自然的三相融合手术之后，这位基因士坠入了异端的深渊，开始进行一系列由他狂热妄想催生出的骇人实验。伊奥贡一次次跨越可容忍的底线，最终丧失了人类的形态，变成了扩区有史以来最恶毒的异端技师之一。他的身躯已彻底化作由血肉、金属和邪恶的太空死灵科技构成的亵渎造物。这个曾被称作操纵者费布鲁斯的生物，最终被无限者特拉金俘获，成为其陈列馆中的一件展品。
languages.original_text: The grief and madness that engulfed the soul of Manipulus Eogunn Februs finally shattered his sanity. After performing the unnatural act of triasomia on the body of his dearest colleague, the Genetor descended into an abyss of heresy, embarking on a series of repulsive experiments conceived by his fevered mind. Straying further and further past all acceptable limits, Eogunn lost his human form and became one of the most malevolent hereteks the Expanse had ever known. His body now fully transformed into a foul construct of flesh, metal, and sinister Necron technology, the creature that had once been Manipulus Februs was captured by Trazyn the Infinite and added to the ranks of the exhibits in his Museion.

languages.text: Le chagrin et la folie qui s'emparèrent du manipulus Eogunn Februs finirent par briser son esprit. Après avoir accompli l'acte contre nature de triasomia sur le corps de son plus cher collègue, le genetor s'enfonça dans l'hérésie et s'employa à de répugnantes expériences nées de ses délires fiévreux. Sombrant de plus en plus profondément dans l'abîme de l'inadmissible, Eogunn perdit sa forme humaine et devint l'un des héréteks les plus dangereux de l'histoire des Étendues. Avec un corps désormais semblable à un abominable assemblage de métal, de chair et de technologies nécrons, la créature qu'on appelait autrefois manipulus Februs fut capturée par Trazyn l'Infini et ajoutée à la collection de son Muséion.
languages.original_text: The grief and madness that engulfed the soul of Manipulus Eogunn Februs finally shattered his sanity. After performing the unnatural act of triasomia on the body of his dearest colleague, the Genetor descended into an abyss of heresy, embarking on a series of repulsive experiments conceived by his fevered mind. Straying further and further past all acceptable limits, Eogunn lost his human form and became one of the most malevolent hereteks the Expanse had ever known. His body now fully transformed into a foul construct of flesh, metal, and sinister Necron technology, the creature that had once been Manipulus Februs was captured by Trazyn the Infinite and added to the ranks of the exhibits in his Museion.

traits.locale_text: Le chagrin et la folie qui s'emparèrent du manipulus Eogunn Februs finirent par briser son esprit. Après avoir accompli l'acte contre nature de triasomia sur le corps de son plus cher collègue, le genetor s'enfonça dans l'hérésie et s'employa à de répugnantes expériences nées de ses délires fiévreux. Sombrant de plus en plus profondément dans l'abîme de l'inadmissible, Eogunn perdit sa forme humaine et devint l'un des héréteks les plus dangereux de l'histoire des Étendues. Avec un corps désormais semblable à un abominable assemblage de métal, de chair et de technologies nécrons, la créature qu'on appelait autrefois manipulus Februs fut capturée par Trazyn l'Infini et ajoutée à la collection de son Muséion.

languages.text: La pena y la locura que devoraron el alma del manipulus Eogunn Februs acabaron por fracturar su mente. Tras realizar el acto antinatural de la triasomía en el cuerpo de su querido colega, el genetor cayó en una espiral de herejía, embarcándose en experimentos repugnantes fruto de su mente febril. Según se alejaba de toda moralidad y limitación, Eogunn perdió su forma humana y se convirtió en uno de los hereteks más malévolos de la historia de la Extensión. Su cuerpo se transformó por completo en un horrendo constructo de carne, metal y tecnología Necrona siniestra y, finalmente, la criatura que había sido el manipulus Februs acabó capturada por Trazyn el Infinito y añadida a las exposiciones de su Museion.

languages.text: Manipülus Eogunn Februs'un ruhunu saran keder ve delilik, sonunda akıl sağlığını darmadağın etti. En değerli meslektaşının bedeni üzerinde o doğal olmayan üçyeközleştirme eylemini gerçekleştirdikten sonra Genetör, kâfirlik uçurumuna sürüklendi ve hummalı zihni tarafından tasarlanan bir dizi iğrenç deneye girişti. Kabul edilebilir tüm sınırları aşarak giderek daha da uzaklaşan Eogunn, insan formunu kaybetti ve Enginlik'in o güne dek tanıdığı en şeytani tekâfirlerden biri oldu. Bedeni artık etten, metalden ve uğursuz Nekron teknolojisinden oluşan iğrenç bir yapıya dönüşen yaratık, yani bir zamanlar Manipülus Februs olan kişi; Mutlak Trazyn tarafından yakalandı ve Müzeion'undaki sergilerin arasına katıldı.
languages.original_text: The grief and madness that engulfed the soul of Manipulus Eogunn Februs finally shattered his sanity. After performing the unnatural act of triasomia on the body of his dearest colleague, the Genetor descended into an abyss of heresy, embarking on a series of repulsive experiments conceived by his fevered mind. Straying further and further past all acceptable limits, Eogunn lost his human form and became one of the most malevolent hereteks the Expanse had ever known. His body now fully transformed into a foul construct of flesh, metal, and sinister Necron technology, the creature that had once been Manipulus Februs was captured by Trazyn the Infinite and added to the ranks of the exhibits in his Museion.

languages.text: Der Schmerz und Wahnsinn, der die Seele von Manipulus Eogunn Februs umgab, raubte ihm schließlich den Verstand. Nachdem er den Körper seines geschätzten Kollegen dem unnatürlichen Akt der Triasomie unterzogen hatte, verlor sich der Genetor in den Tiefen der Ketzerei und vollzog von seinem fiebrigen Verstand getrieben eine Reihe widerwärtiger Experimente. Während er nach und nach alle akzeptablen Grenzen überschritt, verlor Eogunn seine menschliche Gestalt und wurde einer der grausamsten Häretekten, die die Ausdehnung je gesehen hatte. Als sein Körper sich endgültig in ein unheilvolles Konstrukt aus Fleisch, Metall und düsterer Necron-Technologie verwandelt hatte, wurde die Kreatur, die einst Manipulus Februs war, von Trazyn dem Unendlichen gefangen und als Exponat in dessen Museion aufgenommen.
